title: LoopStorm DecisionRequest
description: Request sent from the shim to the engine for every intercepted tool call. See ADR-001.

schema_version.description: Schema version for forward compatibility. Engine rejects unsupported versions.

run_id.description: Client-generated UUID v7 identifying this run. See ADR-004.

seq.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number within this run. Starts at 1.

tool.description: The name of the tool being called (e.g., 'http.request', 'db.query', 'file.write').

args_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of RFC 8785 (JCS) canonical JSON serialization of the tool call arguments. Computed by the shim before sending.

args_redacted.description: Tool call arguments after shim-side redaction. Optional — the engine performs its own redaction pass. If omitted, the engine treats arguments as unavailable for condition matching.

agent_role.description: The agent's role tag for policy matching. See ADR-008. Optional in v1, required in v1.1.

agent_name.description: Human-readable agent name for display and baseline lookups.

model.description: The LLM model identifier (e.g., 'gpt-4o', 'claude-3-5-sonnet'). Used for cost estimation.

input_tokens.description: Input/prompt token count for this call, if known.

output_tokens.description: Output/completion token count for this call, if known.

estimated_cost_usd.description: Shim-estimated cost for this call in USD, if computed.

environment.description: Deployment environment tag (e.g., 'production', 'staging', 'development'). Used in policy condition matching.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the shim intercepted the call.
